sentiment.reasoning: A 15% margin improvement directly signals enhanced operational efficiency and profitability for Ulvon Renewables.

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth of 10% year-over-year indicates strong market demand and successful scaling for Ulvon Renewables.

sentiment.reasoning: A $6.3B share buyback program signals management confidence and provides immediate support for the stock price.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
